_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Evaluate and develop AI workforce structure resources and requirements.
reference_document_element_description: Conduct data and AI workforce planning, including current-state skills assessment, future-state requirements modeling, gap analysis, and talent acquisition and development strategy formulation.
comments: DCWF task equal WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-004 (OP, cosine: 0.634), LS-K-009 (LS, cosine: 0.627).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.8/10 (raw 0.680). Shared vocabulary: [ai, requirements, workforce]. DCWF-only terms [develop, evaluate, resources, structure] vs WIDAI-only terms [acquisition, analysis, assessment, conduct, current, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.881 (P=0.897, R=0.865). P exceeds R by 0.033 — the DCWF element's 9 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Evaluate and develop AI workforce structure resources and requirements." and "Conduct data and AI workforce planning, including current-state skills assessmen" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.693 ≈ STS 0.680 (gap 0.014). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [ai, requirements, workforce] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 16.0%. Shared tokens: [ai, requirements, workforce]. DCWF-only: [develop, evaluate, resources, structure]. WIDAI-only: [acquisition, analysis, assessment, conduct, current, data].
